name: PER_RATES_X
query: SELECT pr.RATE_ID, pr.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pr.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pr.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pr.LEGISLATION_CODE, pr.ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID, pr.PAY_SCALE_ID, pr.GRADE_LADDER_ID, pr.RATE_OBJECT_TYPE, pr.RATE_TYPE, pr.RATE_UOM, pr.CURRENCY_CODE, pr.RATE_FREQUENCY, pr.ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR, prt.NAME, pr.ACTIVE_STATUS, pr.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, pr.ATTRIBUTE1, pr.ATTRIBUTE2, pr.ATTRIBUTE3, pr.ATTRIBUTE4, pr.ATTRIBUTE5, pr.ATTRIBUTE6, pr.ATTRIBUTE7, pr.ATTRIBUTE8, pr.ATTRIBUTE9, pr.ATTRIBUTE10, pr.ATTRIBUTE11, pr.ATTRIBUTE12, pr.ATTRIBUTE13, pr.ATTRIBUTE14, pr.ATTRIBUTE15, pr.ATTRIBUTE16, pr.ATTRIBUTE17, pr.ATTRIBUTE18, pr.ATTRIBUTE19, pr.ATTRIBUTE20, pr.ATTRIBUTE21, pr.ATTRIBUTE22, pr.ATTRIBUTE23, pr.ATTRIBUTE24, pr.ATTRIBUTE25, pr.ATTRIBUTE26, pr.ATTRIBUTE27, pr.ATTRIBUTE28, pr.ATTRIBUTE29, pr.ATTRIBUTE30, pr.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pr.CREATED_BY, pr.CREATION_DATE, pr.LAST_UPDATED_BY, pr.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pr.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, pr.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, pr.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM PER_RATES_F pr, PER_RATES_F_TL prt WHERE pr.RATE_ID = prt.RATE_ID AND pr.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = prt.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND pr.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = prt.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND prt.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG') AND TRUNC(sysdate) BETWEEN pr.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND pr.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
